title: Creamy Tomato Basil Soup
description: Velvety smooth tomato soup with fresh basil, perfect paired with a grilled cheese on a cold day.

steps.instruction: Melt butter in a large pot over medium heat. Add onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add garlic and cook 1 more minute until fragrant.
Add the canned tomatoes (with juices), broth, and sugar. Bring to a simmer.
Simmer for 20 minutes, stirring occasionally, until flavors meld.
Use an immersion blender (or transfer to a blender in batches) and blend until completely smooth.
Stir in the heavy cream and fresh basil. Season with salt and pepper. Serve hot with crusty bread or grilled cheese.

notes: For a richer flavor, roast the tomatoes in the oven at 400°F for 20 minutes before adding to the pot.
